title: Events & Marketing Executive
description:
JOB DESCRIPTIONS:

  • Manage and create a comprehensive marketing campaign to generate sales for various brands and outlets
  • Creates marketing and social media campaigns and strategies for company social media channels, including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and other relevant platforms.
  • Manage the engagement in social media presence creation on new and emerging social media platforms
  • Overseeing the management of social media communications
  • Uses timelines and scheduled content to create a consistent stream of new content for audience interaction while analyzing, managing, and altering schedules where necessary to optimize visits
  • Build brand awareness through various media outlets by producing a brand style guide that best captures the company
  • Plan sales and advertising campaigns and identify potential market trends
  • Design and oversee advertising layouts, create editorial and content creation calendars for social media platforms
  • Prepare, write, and proofread creative copy
  • Research previous successful campaigns
  • Run reports and generate charts for presentation needs and build an image library
  • Assist the restaurant outlets with event inquiry
  • Create a promotions plan to drive and increase sales

REQUIREMENTS:

  • Can work in a fast-paced environment
  • Prior experience in F&B Industry
  • Prior experience in handling events
  • Familiar with social media
  • Able to work independently and in a team
  • Focused and attentive to details
  • Well-organized and self-discipline
  • Good time management
  • Good written and verbal communication

postedCompany.description:
Craftsmen Specialty Coffee is a Singapore independent coffee shop serving variety of specialty coffee and mouth-watering brunches. Established since 2013, we are inspired to serve great coffees with quality beans, hoping to bring a great end-to-end experience for our customers in this fast-paced country. We do believe that every cup matters and we are serious when it comes to our passion in making coffee, not to mention our dishes, which are delicious and well presented on your table. Visit our outlets and grab a cuppa, tell us how you feel!

Making great coffee is the pinnacle of hard work, thousand-mile journeys, and passions. We only source for single origin coffee beans from the best grower around the world, specifically from Brazil, Honduras, Kenya, Ethiopia, Sumatra, Costa Rica, and Guatemala; each with different aroma and aftertaste to cater your preferences. We do sell those beans in packs, feel free to check out our shops for the availability of each single origin beans.
postedCompany.name: KENZEN F&B PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
